# LIVESTREAM & TELEVISION

![](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/891a49_d81820c7bba0438b8f529abd398602d6~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_1715,h_569,fp_0.12_0.52,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Gazoo%20Launch%201_JPG.jpg)

With years of live broadcast television production experience, we are constantly innovating and developing our live capabilities to keep up with rapid technology changes and consumer mannerisms to drive your livestream in the right direction.

Volt Media has delivered live broadcasts directly for some of New Zealand and Australia’s top television broadcasters (TV3, Sky, Fox TV, Kayo) and around the world on streaming platforms like Motorsport.tv.

With a tried and tested pay-per-view platform, we can stream your event from the platform/s of your choice.

Your production deserves top quality coverage, including live graphics packages, fully integrated sponsor graphics, live replays of all the action and live interviews.

Don’t settle for simple event coverage, take it full-throttle with the production level and passion we bring to our work.

![](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/891a49_0f26e177b9a341e990295c6b1fe27be8~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_20,h_35,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Lightning.png)

Solutions for All Budgets: Affordable live stream solutions to suit any budget, with graphics and live-replay action

![](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/891a49_0f26e177b9a341e990295c6b1fe27be8~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_20,h_35,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Lightning.png)

Difficult or Remote Livestreaming: Purpose-built live stream van with ability to live stream at remote and difficult locations

![](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/891a49_0f26e177b9a341e990295c6b1fe27be8~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_20,h_35,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Lightning.png)

Live Sports Events: Capture the energy and excitement of live sporting events for broadcast, fan engagement, or sponsor activation

![](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/891a49_0f26e177b9a341e990295c6b1fe27be8~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_20,h_35,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Lightning.png)

Music Festivals: Immerse audiences in the vibrant atmosphere of music festivals with captivating video productions

![](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/891a49_0f26e177b9a341e990295c6b1fe27be8~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_20,h_35,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Lightning.png)

Theatre Production: Showcase captivating theatrical performances and productions with high-quality video content

![](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/891a49_0f26e177b9a341e990295c6b1fe27be8~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_20,h_35,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Lightning.png)

Corporate Events, Conferences or Launches: Elevate your corporate events, conferences, and product launches with impactful video experiences.

![](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/891a49_8b28dd221b854e1d913f04c484ce7f57~mv2.jpeg/v1/fill/w_828,h_1003,fp_0.48_0.40,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Volt%20Live%20Stream%20Van%20Rally%202_JPEG.jpeg)

### New Zealand’s Premier Drifting Championship Video Production

[SEE MORE](https://www.voltmedia.co.nz/projects/new-zealand-drifting-championship-video-production)

[![](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/329ce8_5fb660651a194121bb850425e3084a4a~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_147,h_83,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,blur_2,enc_avif,quality_auto/Drifting%20Taupo%20Interview%203_JPG.jpg)](https://www.voltmedia.co.nz/projects/new-zealand-drifting-championship-video-production)

### Legends of Speed Video Production

[SEE MORE](https://www.voltmedia.co.nz/projects/legends-of-speed-video-production)

[![](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/329ce8_c8547a2aad2c420abbbc8af1b13dd170~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_147,h_98,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,blur_2,enc_avif,quality_auto/Legends%20of%20Speed%20Joanthan%20and%20Scott%20Dixon.jpg)](https://www.voltmedia.co.nz/projects/legends-of-speed-video-production)

## HIGHLIGHTS

## OUR SERVICES

![](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/891a49_033b65827b074dc292f8f8581e878bb0~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_147,h_110,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,blur_2,enc_avif,quality_auto/Directing%20from%20OB%20Truck.jpg)

#### VIDEO PRODUCTION

Ignite emotions, connect communities, and drive your business or brand forward with powerful video storytelling, delivered by our award-winning video production team.

![](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/891a49_d81820c7bba0438b8f529abd398602d6~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_147,h_110,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,blur_2,enc_avif,quality_auto/Gazoo%20Launch%201_JPG.jpg)

#### LIVESTREAM & TELEVISION

Share your event around New Zealand and across the globe, with our end-to-end event livestreaming and live television services. We've delivered livestream and live television services for some of New Zealand's biggest motorsport and sporting events.

![](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/891a49_257ab15e7f90479c96943534e1c27a2b~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_147,h_70,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,blur_2,enc_avif,quality_auto/Hair%20of%20the%20Dog%20Product%20Video%20Shoot.jpg)

#### CORPORATE VIDEO PRODUCTION

Every business has a powerful story to tell. Our experienced video production team will help you tell your story with energy and drive, and connect with staff, clients and communities.

![](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/891a49_d92e20ca42c94430b4309919ebbd3362~mv2.jpeg/v1/fill/w_147,h_110,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,blur_2,enc_avif,quality_auto/Ian_s%20Ferrari%20Shoot.jpeg)

#### VIDEO FOR DIGITAL

The demand for online video is greater than ever before. Our full-service video creation team will help you meet the demand with compelling and engaging video that sparks your brand's online presence.

## READY TO BRING YOUR CONCEPT TO REALITY?

#### Let’s talk about creating something truly special.

[Contact Us](https://www.voltmedia.co.nz/contact)

web.markdown:
# At Slipstream we work with you to produce and live stream your event.

We provide end-to-end live stream and video solutions across NZ – from multi-camera, studio or venue broadcasts, to conferences, seminars and entertainment events.

Contact our friendly team to find the right solution for you!

[Contact us](https://www.slipstream.co.nz/contact/) [Case Study](https://www.slipstream.co.nz/case-studies)

# At Slipstream we work with you to produce and live stream your event.

## We provide end-to-end live stream and video solutions across NZ – from multi-camera, studio or venue broadcasts, to conferences, seminars and entertainment events.   Contact our friendly team to find the right solution for you!

[Contact us](https://www.slipstream.co.nz/contact/) [Case Study](https://www.slipstream.co.nz/case-studies)

## Case Studies

[![Pacific Health Security & Climate Resilient Symposium](https://www.slipstream.co.nz/media/1288/pacific-intro-solo-speaker-3.jpg?crop=0.10739788631819631,0,0,0.15167546352136943&cropmode=percentage&width=633&height=356&rnd=133909310450000000)![Pacific Health Security & Climate Resilient Symposium](https://www.slipstream.co.nz/media/1288/pacific-intro-solo-speaker-3.jpg?crop=0.12155387780594396,0,0.2898866600536415,0.0000000000000034370439311186&cropmode=percentage&width=450&height=430&rnd=133909310450000000)**Hybrid Event   Pacific Climate Symposium**](https://www.slipstream.co.nz/case-studies/pacific-health-security-climate-resilient-symposium/)

Working with the US DOS Pacific Envoy and it's agency from Washington DC, Slipstream created and broadcast the perfect hybrid event. Bringing in speakers from the US and throughout various Pacific islands and live mixing with speakers at a hub venue in Auckland, this event was a huge success technically and in viewer experience. Looking more like TV, not Zoom.

[Read More](https://www.slipstream.co.nz/case-studies/pacific-health-security-climate-resilient-symposium/)

[![Air New Zealand - 25 LIVE STREAM EVENTS](https://www.slipstream.co.nz/media/1289/airnz6.jpg?crop=0,0.0000000000000001123030091726,0,0&cropmode=percentage&width=633&height=356&rnd=133909310450000000)![Air New Zealand - 25 LIVE STREAM EVENTS](https://www.slipstream.co.nz/media/1289/airnz6.jpg?crop=0,0.1892788729845119,0.52284240953789185,0&cropmode=percentage&width=450&height=430&rnd=133909310450000000)**Air New Zealand   Dreamliner landing takes-off**](https://www.slipstream.co.nz/case-studies/air-new-zealand-25-live-stream-events/)

When the world’s first delivery of the new Boeing Dreamliner arrived in New Zealand, Air New Zealand wanted to share the moment with the world through a live stream. Working with regular streaming partner Slipstream Media, an anticipated 2,000 viewers ballooned to over 40,000 unique viewers across the globe.

[Read More](https://www.slipstream.co.nz/case-studies/air-new-zealand-25-live-stream-events/)

[![Virtual events - remote speakers](https://www.slipstream.co.nz/media/1290/slipstream-hd-multiple-remote-example2.jpg?crop=0.0000000000000005052748343183,0.0000000000000003369090275177,0,0&cropmode=percentage&width=633&height=356&rnd=133909310450000000)![Virtual events - remote speakers](https://www.slipstream.co.nz/media/1290/slipstream-hd-multiple-remote-example2.jpg?center=0.484375,0.515&mode=crop&width=450&height=430&rnd=133909310450000000)**True virtual event    2 Day conference from Wellington to the world**](https://www.slipstream.co.nz/case-studies/virtual-events-remote-speakers/)

Client requirements for this event were complex and multifaceted. Bringing in all remote speakers live video to our studio hub, with full testing prior to the event, we created full background graphics and lower 3rd overlays along with titles to present something beyond the ordinary. However this was not all. We also were required to provide a Q&A interface, a login and registration system with broadcast 4K quality output.

[Read More](https://www.slipstream.co.nz/case-studies/virtual-events-remote-speakers/)

## Slipstream are the pioneers of online live streaming video in New Zealand and Australia. And with almost 20 years' experience capturing, encoding and delivering thousands of events of all sizes and nature, you can trust us with your next project.

[Find Out More](https://www.slipstream.co.nz/contact/)

## Discover More

## Go live with confidence

We work with you and your team to develop your own end-to-end solution, or integrate seamlessly with your existing infrastructure. When the lights go on, you can breathe easy knowing every detail is dialled in just the way you want it.

## Reach your audience everywhere

Using our HTML5 platform delivery you can embed your live stream in your website, play it on your branded app or broadcast it across your social channels.

## Interact with people in real-time

Empower your audience to join in. From two-way AV streaming to live chat and real-time polls, we bring you and your audience closer than ever before.

## Monetise and create new revenue

Create new revenue streams for your live event by adding a payment gateway to your live-stream and inviting subscriptions, or archiving and adding an on-demand feature.

## Partner up with the best

Tap into our trusted network of local specialists and global experts. We only work with the best, including Akamai, the world's largest Content Delivery Network.

## Contact Us

## Start live-streaming today

Our end-to-end and fully-managed solutions start from just **$450**.

Talk to us about how we can help you.

[Get Started](https://www.slipstream.co.nz/contact/)

web.markdown:
![live streaming & webcasting](https://www.vidcom.com/livestream/Livestream-banner.jpg)

# Live Streaming & Webcasting

#### **Going Live Shouldn’t Be a Gamble**

- **Worried your livestream will buffer, glitch, or just fall flat?**
Vidcom delivers rock-solid, professional live streaming services for conferences, corporate meetings, awards nights, and hybrid events - so your message reaches your audience clearly, wherever they are.

- **Not sure how to make it all work technically?**
From camera crews and switching to branded platforms and social streaming, we handle every detail - so you don’t have to.

- **Need to engage people who can’t be in the room?**
We make virtual audiences feel just as involved, with features like live chat, Q&A, and custom event pages that drive interaction and connection.

- **Worried about accessibility?**
We’ve got you - with closed captioning, NZSL, and multi-language interpretation, we ensure everyone can tune in and take part.

- **Want high-quality content you can reuse?**
Every stream includes crisp recordings for post-event playback, marketing, or internal use.


#### **Take your event further**

###### Partner with Vidcom

for stress-free, professional live streaming - anywhere in New Zealand.

Vidcom livestream promo from Vidcom New Zealand on Vimeo

![video thumbnail](https://i.vimeocdn.com/video/2060648640-f7101a52fdebf20caffee519a15e66caca8e99e991448fa70e05e0901bb4090d-d?mw=80&q=85)

“

> [**“We recently worked with the team at Vidcom to deliver the CA ANZ 2025 online NZ Tax Update Roadshow. The team were excellent - friendly, helpful, and responsive to our needs and requests. They looked after everything on the technical side so we could focus on delivering our presentation. The Vidcom team helped to put us at ease. We were able to rehearse and test things before the event. Our experience was excellent, and we would not hesitate to use the studio and work with Vidcom again."**](https://www.vidcom.com/case-studies-01.html)

**Lindsay, Jolayne & Teri**

Chartered Accountants Australia, and New Zealand (CA ANZ)


#### **Professional Live Streaming Services for Events, Conferences & Corporate Meetings**

Bring your event to a global audience with Vidcom New Zealand’s expert live streaming solutions. Whether you’re hosting a conference, awards night, shareholder meeting, or hybrid event, we deliver smooth, high-quality broadcasts that extend your reach and boost engagement.

Stream in real time to a custom-branded event page or across your social media channels, making it easy for remote audiences to connect, participate, and interact - wherever they are.


With Vidcom’s live streaming services, your message is delivered clearly, professionally, and without stress - no matter the size or scope of your event.

* * *

metadata.description: Streaming an event online brings people together. The internet allows for audience participation and exposure to wider demographics, in situations where it wouldn’t normally be practical. Whether on a private connection, or publicly on YouTube or Vimeo.com, live stream your next conference, shareholder assembly, or business meeting with Vidcom.

# Live streaming   services Brisbane

### WHY US?

**Live streaming** refers to a session hosted virtually across several social media sites. As a result of this capability, attendees can participate in the event from almost any location. By using the **Live Streaming** features of Livestream Pro, you can host interactive sessions for your audience. You will increase your organization’s online profile and widen the scope of your customer base if you accomplish this. **Live streaming** services are an effective method for spreading the word about important events such as introducing new products or making important announcements.

- High-definition video
- High-quality audio
- Using a variety of cameras
- Wifi access is included.

### WHAT’S YOUR EVENT?

Live streaming is increasingly becoming the preferred method when it comes to finding entertainment. Using Twitch and Facebook Live to promote your small business is more complicated. Are you trying to accomplish anything in particular by meeting? What’s more important: a funeral, a lecture, or a school gathering? Any form of **Live Stream** service that you could need assistance with is available here at your disposal.

**Wedding:** We are experts in providing wedding broadcasts of a high standard at reasonable prices.

**School Events:** With the help of our high-definition, professional streaming services, it won’t be difficult for you to bring viewers at home into the next school event you host.

**Seminar:** If you want to boost revenue, reduce the need for attendees to travel, and increase the number of people who attend your following lecture, you should consider live streaming it.

**Funeral: Live streaming** of the funeral enables all of the deceased person’s family members and friends to interact, recall shared memories, and express their condolences. The people who care about you can send their messages of support in real-time from wherever they are in the world.

web.title: Digital Vision Live - Live Streaming, Live Production
web.description: LIVE STREAMING. Stream your videos and live broadcasts to audiences across New Zealand and around the world, thanks to our super-fast content delivery network.
web.markdown:
[Skip to content](https://digitalvision.live/#content)

## Professional Live streaming for events, business and education

[Get in touch](https://digitalvision.live/contact/)

[Services](https://digitalvision.live/services/)

# Digital Vision Live

## NZ's most trusted live video provider

#### LIVE stream platform

Stream your video content and live broadcasts to audiences across New Zealand and around the world. A globally accelerated network with over 100 global nodes. The platform is optimized for quality & performance, not cost. Deliver content to your viewers at the fastest possible speeds, resulting in reliable viewer experiences.

#### LIVE stream production

With over ten years experience in delivering video productions for local and national events, corporate communications, schools, sporting organisations of all sizes and live entertainment such as shows, you can trust us with all your live video production needs.

## Our live platform

### LIVE STREAMING

Stream your videos and live broadcasts to audiences across New Zealand and around the world, thanks to our super-fast content delivery network. A robust platform with innovative features such as content tags for easy search, reference ID's for directing content to deployed players, simulcast, chromecast, analytics and much more.

### STREAM HOSTING

Host your live stream on our dedicated website. No need to worry about high viewer numbers bombarding your own website. We have a simple method for you to submit your event details and viewer requirements. Get your Live event ready for your audience quickly and easily.

### PLAYLIST SUPPORT

Playlists are a great way to add multiple Live streams or VOD content to a single player using our Reference ID feature and playlists. Great for sporting events with multiple concurrent Live streams and VOD of past games for catch up viewing.

### VIDEO ON DEMAND

Automated cloud recordings can be set on all your Live Streams. After your Live stream ends the recordings are made available almost immediately as VOD content. Ensure viewers never miss the action.

### CONTENT INJECTION

Configure your Live stream player to receive manual or automated ad injection. Set your own schedules and connect to professional Ad services such as VAAST or create playlists from content directly uploaded to our platform. Set Ad bumpers and stingers to auto play every time the player is launched.

### REMOTE PRODUCTION

Deliver direct camera feeds back to our studio from multiple locations ready for remote video production. We add graphics and additional content such as commentators or advertising. SRT technology is revolutionizing Live video production.

### REMOTE LIVE SCORE

Live scores directly into your streams as overlay graphics or as a data source. This allows scoring to be done directly by official scorers at the venue independent of where the production is taking place.

### PAY PER VIEW

Paywall services directly built into the player for ease of use and simplicity. Manage subscriptions for Live and VOD content. This is a custom service and is available as an add on.

[ask about pricing](https://digitalvision.live/contact/)

**The Studio, Richmond**

The Studio is located close to the city, and is a large 250sqm studio space providing versatility to accommodate many types of streaming production. The studio focuses on a 2.08mm pitch LED screen, flanked with checkerboard’ LED cabinets that allow for corporate logos, or fun graphic effects. With its modern industrial space, we find producers choose to use the building as quick and low cost set pieces. The Studio boasts a rigging grid supported by 24 remotely controlled hoists, making changes to set and LX quick and easy. There is a 200 megabit up/down fibre connection with dedicated 1000 megabit between all three of our studio spaces. Panasonic 4K cameras provide perfect images for pre-record, and live stream outputs, and HTH have a dedicated high-speed FTP server that allows file sharing live as it’s being recorded, for remote editing facilities to begin post production while content continues to be captured.

**The Loft, Richmond**

The Loft is located in our Richmond warehouse space and offers an industrial art-style studio for smaller conferencing, live music and webcast solutions. It has a 2.8mm pitch expandable Black LED screen, along with green screen floor and wall surfaces to allow for multiple use within a single hire. A box truss grid is suspended from the 6m high ceiling to allow for quick re-sets of the space, or to add custom LX plots as required. Connected via a 200 megabit up / down dedicated fibre link, it also has access to our high speed FTP site allowing file sharing live as it’s being recorded, for remote editing facilities to begin post production while content continues to be captured. Supported by our Panasonic 4K cameras, streaming is via a multitude of options to both public and dedicated white label platforms in-house.

We do virtual multiple room conferences, internal staff updates, town halls and AGMs servicing multiple destinations simultaneously and social media channels such as Instagram, Facebook, Twitter, and YouTube.

![](https://www.cxnetwork.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2020/09/Streamlab_1-300x251.jpg)

![](https://www.cxnetwork.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2020/09/Streamlab_3-300x200.jpg)

## Streamlab

![](https://www.cxnetwork.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2020/09/Streamlab_2-300x200.jpg)

**W** \| [https://www.streamlab.com.au](https://www.streamlab.com.au/)

**P** \| 1300 242 098

**E** \| [alix@streamlab.com.au](mailto:alix@streamlab.com.au)

**Locations:**

Streamlab is a full-service live streaming and production house that has been providing a wide variety of live streaming, remote production, virtual events & digital platform services for the past five years. Our in-house developed, managed streaming platform allows us to build out custom built and fully branded live streaming portals, with features like chat, Q&A, polls, PPV (pay per view), user registration, on demand replay, integration with CRMs & SaaS services and more as standard.

In addition to our managed platform, we have extensive experience in delivering & producing live streams and virtual events, a large inventory of professional broadcast & streaming equipment and a team of highly trained, experienced and friendly technicians ready to support you in delivering an exciting & engaging live stream.

![](https://www.cxnetwork.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2020/08/Rohan-Sophia-300x225.jpg)

![](https://www.cxnetwork.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2020/08/DSC_4895-300x197.jpg)

## Streamout

![](https://www.cxnetwork.com.au/streaming-services/)

**W** \| [https://www.streamout.net.au/](https://www.streamout.net.au/)

**P** \| 0403 389 951

**E** \| [contact@streamout.net.au](mailto:contact@streamout.net.au)

**Locations:**

Canberra-based full service streaming complete with onsite production and in the cloud. Vmix, Wirecast, Kiloview encoding and decoding, bonded encoding using LiveU Solos as well highly resilient first mile with up to four independent paths into the internet with automatic failover. Manned broadcast cameras or BirdDog P200 PTZ cameras, full audio and lighting. Specialist with remote production. Proprietary content delivery network with edge locations in Sydney, Melbourne and Perth with the capacity for unlimited concurrent viewers. Very happy to assist other streamers as “your guy” in Canberra, or provide the streaming brains for other producers with their own local production.

![](https://www.cxnetwork.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2020/08/Studio-45-WOS-Event-2-300x169.jpg)

![](https://www.cxnetwork.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2020/08/EO2003-010-300x200.jpg)

## Studio45

![](https://www.cxnetwork.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2020/08/ATCL-2-300x169.jpg)

**W** \| [https://studio45.live/](https://studio45.live/)

**P** \| 1300 966 424

**E** \| [studio45@woohah.com.au](mailto:studio45@woohah.com.au)

**Locations:**
Melbourne VIC 3195

Studio45 is a 2000sqm facility offering state-of-the-art studio facilities with the latest audio, lighting and video technology. Boasting a 14m wide ROE Diamond 2mm digital LED screen, broadcast cameras, dedicated remote presenter systems and multi-WAN internet connection to support your next virtual event. The studio space is supported by a wealth of experience in live streaming, pay-per-view, on demand and live broadcast solutions delivering virtual event series, webinars, conferences and live music throughout the world. Our broadcast team can support your event with fully white-labelled solutions including branding, interactivity and virtual environments to engage with your audience on any device, worldwide.

![](https://www.cxnetwork.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2020/08/IMG_4423-300x225.jpg)

![](https://www.cxnetwork.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2020/08/IMG_8577-300x225.jpg)

## Sydney Event Services

![](https://www.cxnetwork.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2020/08/studio-7-298x300.png)

**W** \| [https://sydneyeventservices.com/](https://sydneyeventservices.com/)

**P** \| (02) 8539 2889

**E** \| [sales@sydneyeventservices.com](mailto:sales@sydneyeventservices.com)

**Locations:**
16 Carrington Road Marrickville, NSW, 2204

We have six studios provided by Sydney Props Studios, perfect for any kind of stream or virtual event, located a five minute walk from either Tempe or Marrickville Station. Teaming up with Sydney Props Group, we can create any set or theme that you require for your stream. We are a one stop shop for all things streaming. We can create realistic sets, instead of your usual LED screen and moving light. With the Custom Elements shop in house also, there is no limit to what we can create. We stock a range of different brands for all your AV needs, we cover all things lighting, vision and audio. We have 6k cinema cameras ready to give you a stunning record.

![](https://www.cxnetwork.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2020/09/Melbourne-Studio-300x225.jpeg)

![](https://www.cxnetwork.com.au/streaming-services/)

## TDC MELBOURNE

![](https://www.cxnetwork.com.au/streaming-services/)

**W** \| [https://www.tdc.com.au/technology/virtual-event-solutions/](https://www.tdc.com.au/technology/virtual-event-solutions/)

**P** \| (03) 9647 5901 or 0400 658 156

**E** \| [brad.williams@tdc.com.au](mailto:brad.williams@tdc.com.au)

**Locations:**
Port Melbourne, Melbourne

Our purpose built Melbourne **TDC LiveView** **Studio** is aversatile space located close to the CBD with complete production support facilities. When you are looking for a company that offers the depth of technical experience to deliver complex livestreams across multiple time zones and destinations, TDC has the capability, technology and experience to deliver these technically complex shows. The studio can accommodate everything from corporate events to car launches and television commercial shoots. Our experienced technical and production support teams are well-versed in international broadcast events, studio events, and live streaming events.

Our Melbourne studio space offers a 2mm pitch LED Screen combined multiview with Sony cameras, audio console, Creamsource LED lighting, Barco E3, and all the additional technology for presenter support. TDC LiveView bridge with global broadcast-grade fibre connectivity. Iso and program record capabilities, speaker timer and notes system, remote and local customisable multi-view displays inclusive of prompt, notes, and audience questions, for local and remote presenters or participants.

Parking on site, kitchen facilities, green rooms, meeting rooms and COVID-19 compliance.

![](https://www.cxnetwork.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2020/09/1-TDCStudio--300x169.jpeg)

![](https://www.cxnetwork.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2020/09/IMG_1586-300x169.jpeg)

## TDC SYDNEY

![](https://www.cxnetwork.com.au/streaming-services/)

**W** \| [https://www.tdc.com.au/technology/virtual-event-solutions/](https://www.tdc.com.au/technology/virtual-event-solutions/)

**P** \| (02) 8332 2100

**E** \| [hello@tdc.com.au](mailto:hello@tdc.com.au)

**Locations:**
Alexandria, Sydney

Our purpose built Sydney **TDC LiveView** **Studio is** a versatile space located close to the CBD. When you are looking for a company that offers the depth of technical experience to deliver complex livestreams across multiple time zones and destinations, TDC has the capability, technology and experience to deliver these technically complex shows. The studio can accommodate everything from corporate events to car launches and television commercial shoots. Our friendly experienced technical and production support teams are well-versed in international broadcast events, studio events, and live streaming events.

**Our Sydney Studio Space**

Our Sydney Studio offers robust technical solution with advanced live stream capability.  A 2mm pitch LED screen with 12 x 5m curved design,  3mm pitch LED ceiling of 10.8m x 3.6m, broadcast cameras (manned and remote), Barco E3 and disguise GX2C media servers for show control, foldback/presenter comfort monitors, studio lighting , studio audio, two live stream control rooms systems with redundancy, TDC LiveView bridge with global broadcast-grade fibre connectivity, iso and program record capabilities, speaker timer and notes system. Remote and local customisable multi-view displays inclusive of prompt, notes, and audience questions, for local and remote presenters or participants. Secure car parking on site, kitchen facilities, green room, meeting rooms, and COVID-19 compliance.

![](https://www.cxnetwork.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2021/11/Curve-LED-2-TES-300x200.jpg)

![](https://www.cxnetwork.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2021/11/IMG_1858-300x225.jpg)

## Technical Event Solutions

![](https://www.cxnetwork.com.au/streaming-services/)

**W** \| [https://www.tes.nz/](https://www.tes.nz/)

**P** \| 03 365 3838

**E** \| [info@tes.nz](mailto:info@tes.nz)

**Locations:**
Christchurch & Dunedin, New Zealand

TES are a leading supplier of production to New Zealand’s South Island, having a full range of state of the art Audio Visual, Sound, Lighting, Staging and LED Screen equipment in house. From broadcast cameras, PTZs, vMix servers and all the equipment that goes in between, TES have the knowledge and kit to stream to YouTube, Facebook, Zoom, Teams and much more, from community and corporate events up to full broadcast spec. We can also supply IMAG, Lighting and full audio services. Call or email today to find out how we can help with your next stream, virtual conference, or hybrid event.

![](https://www.cxnetwork.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2020/08/Metro-119-300x200.jpg)

![](https://www.cxnetwork.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2020/08/Metro-243-300x200.jpg)

## Technical Events

![](https://www.cxnetwork.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2020/08/Metro-505-300x200.jpg)

**W** \| [https://www.technicalevents.com.au/](https://www.technicalevents.com.au/)

**P** \| 03 9372 6886

**E** \| [sales@technicalevents.com.au](mailto:sales@technicalevents.com.au)

**Locations:**

Metropolis Events, on the banks of the Yarra River in Southgate, is our streaming studio, offering unrivalled views of the Melbourne CBD and second-to-none audio visual infrastructure. The studio is designed for flexibility and is suitable for, but not limited to, awards nights, conferences, webinars, product launches, hybrid events and live streaming with a fully integrated broadcast, recording and editing suite.

![](https://www.cxnetwork.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2020/08/Wheeler-Centre-Performance-Space-300x200.jpg)

![](https://www.cxnetwork.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2020/08/Wheeler-Centre-Performance-Space2-300x200.jpeg)

## The Wheeler Centre

![](https://www.cxnetwork.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2020/08/Wheeler-Digital-2-300x158.png)

**W** \| [https://www.wheelercentre.com/](https://www.wheelercentre.com/)

**P** \| 03 9094 7800

**E** \| [reception@wheelercentre.com](mailto:reception@wheelercentre.com)

**Locations:**
176 Little Lonsdale St, Melbourne VIC 3000

The Wheeler Centre has a number of different rooms and spaces for hire, with a wide range of tech and staging capabilities to suit any event. Our spaces are available for hire by individuals, as well as community and corporate groups. We have a suite of meeting rooms, conference rooms and our main auditorium, all available with flexible set-up to suit your needs. We also offer a range of digital event services, from a mix of live streamed in studio events, to fully remote events, with both the audience and presenters all tuning in from home. We can produce a slick, edited and mixed pre-record, or a fully live-streamed and interactive event experience.

![](https://www.cxnetwork.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2020/08/Veritas_Studio_June_2020_001-300x200.jpg)

![](https://www.cxnetwork.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2020/08/CL_interviews-300x200.jpg)

## Veritas Events

![](https://www.cxnetwork.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2020/08/Webinar-300x169.jpg)

**W** \| [https://www.veritas.com.au/](https://www.veritas.com.au/)

**P** \| +61 2 8908 5600

**E** \| [studio@veritas.com.au](mailto:studio@veritas.com.au)

**Locations:**

Veritas Events is a leading full-service events and production management agency. Based in Sydney, we provide creative solutions and delivery of virtual and face to face brand experiences locally and internationally with clients across all industry sectors. Under our Veritas Studio brand, our team brings together the right combination of AV technology, broadcast platform, studio (or other environment) and creative content into a carefully crafted and dynamic virtual event experience. We consider and manage the whole experience, not just the streaming bit! Our services include: Full technical production management, Veritas Studio digital experiences – content creation and digital media, Studio management, Content Management, Virtual and event broadcast platform solutions, Event communications, design and creative, Event project management, registration and logistics. what about all the caps?

![](https://www.cxnetwork.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2020/09/CS-Video-300x225.jpg)

![](https://www.cxnetwork.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2020/09/Chris-and-Mark-300x168.png)

## Voyager Sound

![](https://www.cxnetwork.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2020/09/CS-Audio-225x300.jpg)

**W** \| [http://www.voyagersound.com.au/](http://www.voyagersound.com.au/)

**P** \| 0408 171 937

**E** \| [voyagersound@hotmail.com](mailto:voyagersound@hotmail.com)

**Locations:**
Sydney, NSW

We combine your creative vision with technical production expertise to create unforgettable live-streams, events and experiences. This is where our technical and project management expertise merges with your creative vision, to turn that spark into a supernova. With in-house professional audio visual, lighting and production resources, we are a one stop shop for an end-to-end event service, tailored towards the needs of every client. Performance is a traditional area for our work. We have always supported our clients in their creative endeavours and continue to do so through the current challenges. By embracing new technology and techniques we carry your message, delivering it to your audience, wherever they may be.

[Scroll To Top](https://www.cxnetwork.com.au/streaming-services/#)

web.markdown:
# lIVE STREAMING SERVICES Technical, Creative, boutique AV Services.

Live Streaming Services endeavours to exceed your expectations, by actively listening to your needs, transforming your vision into a reality. Together we can bring your event alive, whatever the occasion.

arrow\_back\_ios

Start Your Journey

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/663c1fccefa46b61b306f918/667cf432bbc3503f267164be_Live%20Streaming%20Background%20Images_Header%20(8).webp)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/663c1fccefa46b61b306f918/667cf451bc6edf3a26402ae0_Live%20Streaming%20Background%20Images_Header%20(11).webp)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/663c1fccefa46b61b306f918/667cf47638d3adbb3175c1a7_Live%20Streaming%20Background%20Images_Header%20(2).webp)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/663c1fccefa46b61b306f918/667cf4b2cf699c9d09b7987e_Live%20Streaming%20Background%20Images_Header%20(15).webp)

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/663c1fccefa46b61b306f918/667cf4d3f6f07a47775d79cd_Live%20Streaming%20Background%20Images_Header%20(13).webp)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/663c1fccefa46b61b306f918/667cf500dd6de7c309958007_Live%20Streaming%20Background%20Images_Header%20(9).webp)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/663c1fccefa46b61b306f918/667cf517c51329c61d7dde03_Live%20Streaming%20Background%20Images_Header%20(16).webp)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/663c1fccefa46b61b306f918/667cf4b2cf699c9d09b7987e_Live%20Streaming%20Background%20Images_Header%20(15).webp)

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/663c1fccefa46b61b306f918/667cf55160583dc8a075c097_Live%20Streaming%20Background%20Images_Header%20(6).webp)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/663c1fccefa46b61b306f918/667cf57138247e88ca9df34a_Live%20Streaming%20Background%20Images_Header%20(3).webp)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/663c1fccefa46b61b306f918/667cf57138247e88ca9df34a_Live%20Streaming%20Background%20Images_Header%20(3).webp)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/663c1fccefa46b61b306f918/667cf500dd6de7c309958007_Live%20Streaming%20Background%20Images_Header%20(9).webp)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/663c1fccefa46b61b306f918/667cf61aab01d3e2e7764f90_Live%20Streaming%20Background%20Images_Header%20(12).webp)

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/663c1fccefa46b61b306f918/667cf64a26269bb924aaad31_Live%20Streaming%20Background%20Images_Header%20(5).webp)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/663c1fccefa46b61b306f918/667cf66c3213dbf9980bf14a_Live%20Streaming%20Background%20Images_Header%20(10).webp)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/663c1fccefa46b61b306f918/667cf6c6f6f07a47775ebfd5_Live%20Streaming%20Background%20Images_Header%20(14).webp)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/663c1fccefa46b61b306f918/667cf451bc6edf3a26402ae0_Live%20Streaming%20Background%20Images_Header%20(11).webp)

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/663c1fccefa46b61b306f918/667cf432bbc3503f267164be_Live%20Streaming%20Background%20Images_Header%20(8).webp)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/663c1fccefa46b61b306f918/667cf500dd6de7c309958007_Live%20Streaming%20Background%20Images_Header%20(9).webp)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/663c1fccefa46b61b306f918/667cf4b2cf699c9d09b7987e_Live%20Streaming%20Background%20Images_Header%20(15).webp)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/663c1fccefa46b61b306f918/667cf55160583dc8a075c097_Live%20Streaming%20Background%20Images_Header%20(6).webp)

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/663c1fccefa46b61b306f918/667cea2d41ab869953953418_Live%20Streaming%20Services_About%20Us_Team_Home%20Page.jpeg)

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/663c1fccefa46b61b306f918/663ca31ab758d28526e4d29d_livestreamingservices_About%20Us%20Home_3.jpeg)

About Us

### We strive for quality in delivering our service, leaving no stone unturned.

More than 30 years of experience in IT, Network Engineering, Audio Engineering, Technical Directing, Production Management and Videography – the only choice is Live Streaming Services for your next event.

We don’t just do Live Streaming, we cover everything from AV to IT. We believe in an allround service, as a single contact point for your event.

High Class Equipment

High quality live streaming at the right price, for a budget conscious future.

Top Notch Team Work

Ensuring every moment is crystal clear and captivating for your audience.

‍

[Book a strategy call](https://www.livestreamingservices.net.au/contact)

## Services

### Live Streaming

The core of our spirit - with Live Streaming you can rely on consummate expertise on every level.

### Audio Visual

Not Just Live Streaming, we cover everything you need for a show, audio systems, conference AV, focus groups, installs.  The one stop shop, for you event.

### Creative

Promo videos, drone footage or B-Roll we’ve got you covered. With your brief we make the most of bringing dreams to life.

### Consulting

### White Label AV

## Client Stories and Experiences

Discover why our clients' voices echo with satisfaction and gratitude as they share their journey through our services.

“As an event manager of over 25 years, I have particularly high standards and I was pleasantly surprised to meet a fellow high -performer in Brad upon referral from a fellow event manager.  Brad has an attention to detail to ensure all production values are covered off for brilliant roll-out, he QCs the show with you prior to even setting foot on ground in the venue and does it all in a time efficient manner, with humour and flair.

He is expert at dealing with changes on the fly and provides options on the table to improve audience experience.  It’s rare to get this level of proactive professionalism these days in our sector and SHOUT Productions will always place Live Streaming Services as preferred supplier for our productions.”

Misha Prusa

[FIND OUT MORE](http://www.bigpicture.com/)

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5cd2d976bfa1c918ef30f727/60bf6b3031b28738d665bc37_CT-Logo-Box---No-Region_web.jpg)

CT specialises in display and broadcast production solutions for Sport, Television, Concert, and Corporate Events across Australia.

[FIND OUT MORE](https://www.ct-group.com/aus/)

# Behind Powerful Production

NEP Live Events Australia and New Zealand offers a full range of audiovisual solutions for the sports, entertainment, broadcast and corporate markets through our two exceptional brands: Creative Technology and Big Picture.

# Global Scale, Local service

NEP Live Events Australia is part of the NEP Worldwide Network, the leading worldwide outsourced technical production partner supporting premier content producers of live sports, entertainment, music and corporate events. For over 30 years, NEP has provided the technology and know-how for:

# Broadcast Services

**Mobile Units and OBs**

**Flypacks**

**Studio Production**

**Centralized Production**

**Host Broadcast Support Services**

**Systems Integration**

**Post Production**

**Augmented Reality**

**Audio**

**Lighting**

**Master Control**

**Advanced Content Delivery**

**Intuitive System Monitoring**

Learn more about the NEP Worldwide Network at: www.nepgroup.com
